[EXPERIMENTAL] Redeliver a specific webhook event

## Synopsis

[EXPERIMENTAL] Redeliver a specific webhook event.

Triggers the Pulumi Service to redeliver a specific event to a
webhook. This is useful for resending an event that the webhook
endpoint failed to process on the initial delivery attempt.

Returns the delivery result with HTTP status and response details.
Returns an error if the webhook or event does not exist.

```
pulumi stack webhook delivery redeliver <id> <event-id> [flags]
```

## Examples

```
  # Redeliver an event
  pulumi stack webhook delivery redeliver 1a2b3c4d evt-abc123

  # Redeliver and get the full result as JSON
  pulumi stack webhook delivery redeliver 1a2b3c4d evt-abc123 --output json
```

## Options

```
  -h, --help            help for redeliver
  -o, --output string   The output format: default (human-readable text) or json (default "default")
  -s, --stack string    The name of the stack to operate on. Defaults to the current stack
```
